Welcome Home

Where Luxury Meets
Everyday Comfort

This isn't just a room for rent — it's a lifestyle. Step into a meticulously designed smart home featuring luxurious hardwood flooring throughout, crystal pendant chandelier lighting in every room, granite countertops, and custom decorative accents around every corner. Smart lighting throughout lets you set the perfect ambiance at the tap of a button. From the curated hallway gallery wall to the covered back porch with fire pit, every detail has been thoughtfully designed for comfort, style, and elevated modern living.

Interior Finishes

  • Luxurious hardwood flooring throughout

Outdoor Living
